articles.title: Google just declared itself a contender in AI design at IO 2026
articles.description: Google says it's designed the app to be accessible to everyone, from teachers to small business owners.

articles.title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026
articles.description: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.

articles.title: How to use Google’s new AI agents to go beyond your standard searches
articles.description: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.

articles.title: Discord enables end-to-end encrypted voice and video calling for every user
articles.description: Good news! Discord's hundreds of millions of users now have their communications scrambled, so not even Discord can see them.

articles.title: Mach Industries just spent $50M to solve a major defense tech problem
articles.description: Mach says the acquisition meaningfully improves unit economics across its five vehicle programs at exactly the moment the company is starting to scale.

articles.title: From teen hacker to Iron Dome researcher, this founder raised $28M to fight AI phishing
articles.description: Ocean, an agentic email security platform, raised funding from Lightspeed Venture Partners.

articles.title: Elon Musk said Sam Altman “stole” a non-profit — but the trial showed he had similar aims
articles.description: “By the end of this week, you and Sam will be the most hated men in America.”

articles.title: Google takes a page out of Meta’s book, announces new audio-powered smart glasses at IO 2026
articles.description: Google is calling the new devices "audio glasses," in that users will be able to issue verbal commands to them and get things done via its ecosystem of apps and services, including Gemini.

articles.title: Google’s Genie world model can now simulate real streets with Street View
articles.description: Google DeepMind is integrating Street View with Project Genie to create immersive, interactive world simulations for robotics, gaming, and travel, allowing users to explore environments, weather changes, and rare scenarios.

articles.title: With Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google bets its next AI wave on agents, not chatbots
articles.description: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference. It is capable of autonomously executing complex tasks and building software from scratch.

articles.title: Google Search as you know it is over
articles.description: Google is transforming Search from a list of links into an AI-powered experience filled with conversational answers, autonomous agents, and interactive interfaces — a shift that could further reduce traffic to publishers across the web.

articles.title: Google’s AI Studio now lets anyone build Android apps in minutes
articles.description: Google unveiled new web-based AI tools that can generate native Android apps in minutes, as the company expands its push into AI-powered software development.

articles.title: Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude at IO 2026
articles.description: The updates signal Google’s push to turn its Gemini app into an all-purpose AI hub rather than a stand-alone chatbot.

articles.title: Agentic app coding gets an upgrade with Google’s release of Android CLI
articles.description: Google is embracing the rise of AI coding agents with new Android tools designed to work with platforms like Claude Code and OpenAI’s Codex, allowing developers — or their AI assistants — to build Android apps faster from the command line.

articles.title: Google’s new Universal Cart wants to follow your entire shopping journey across the internet
articles.description: Most people shop across multiple devices, many retailers, and over the course of many days, which is why Google is launching Universal Cart.

articles.title: Google introduces Gemini Spark, a 24/7 agentic assistant with Gmail integration, at IO 2026
articles.description: At the Google I/O developer conference, the company announced a new agentic personal assistant called Gemini Spark, built from Gemini's base models and an agentic harness from Google Antigravity.

articles.title: Google adds voice-based prompting to Docs and Keep
articles.description: Google is letting users create drafts, take notes, and search for email with voice with the new Workspace update.

articles.title: Google launches Antigravity 2.0 with an updated desktop app and CLI tool at IO 2026
articles.description: Google is debuting a new AI Ultra plan priced at $100, which will give users 5x more usage limit than the AI Pro plan alongside the Antigravity 2.0 launch.

articles.title: Google’s Gemini Omni turns images, audio, and text into video — and that’s just the start
articles.description: Google's Gemini Omni is a new multimodal model that reasons across text, images, audio, and video to generate and edit videos through simple conversation — starting with Omni Flash.

articles.title: OpenAI is making it easier to check if an image was made by their models
articles.description: OpenAI announced two new measures to help detect AI generated imagery: joining the open C2PA standard and adding Google's SynthID to its products.

articles.title: FBI seeks US-wide access to license plate cameras, wants "data in near real time"
articles.description: FBI will pay vendors to help it track and search for vehicles nationwide.

articles.title: Spider-Noir final trailer gives us a classic villain
articles.description: It's never too late to become a hero.

articles.title: "I'll buy 10 of those"—NASA science chief yearns for mass-produced satellites
articles.description: "How in the hell do I get more science into space? That is my goal."

articles.title: Plex's 200% Lifetime Pass price hike tries forcing users to another subscription
articles.description: Plex says that it has considered getting rid of Lifetime Passes.

articles.title: Two AI-based science assistants succeed with drug-retargeting tasks
articles.description: Both tools generate hypotheses; one goes on to analyze some of the data.

articles.title: Google's SynthID AI watermarking tech is being adopted by OpenAI, Nvidia, and more
articles.description: AI content is getting good, but SynthID might be able to help tell truth from fiction.

articles.title: In stunning display of stupid, secret CISA credentials found in public GitHub repo
articles.description: SSH keys, plaintext passwords, other sensitive data had been up since November 2025.

articles.title: RFK Jr. forced to withdraw charter that opened CDC panel to anti-vaccine quacks
articles.description: Charter would have expanded member eligibility and focused on alleged injuries.

articles.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash might be fast enough for gen AI to make sense
articles.description: Google says its more efficient Gemini 3.5 Flash is the key to your agentic AI future.

articles.title: The era of 1,000 Hz gaming monitors has arrived, but why?
articles.description: LG's latest hits one frame per millisecond at a full 1080p resolution.

articles.title: EV drivers will pay $130 a year under Congress' 2026 transportation bill
articles.description: Politicians say they want EVs to pay "their fair share for the use of our roads."

articles.title: Civilization VII finally lets you build a civ that stands the test of time
articles.description: Civ 7 ’s devs talk walking back the game's most controversial decision.

articles.title: Electrical utility megamerger is all about the data centers
articles.description: NextEra’s blockbuster deal with Dominion likely means higher bills for consumers.

articles.title: In addition to space stations, Vast says it will now build high-power satellites
articles.description: "Every single successful space company is diversified in its products."

articles.title: Iran demands Big Tech pay fees for undersea Internet cables in Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Iran's claim over subsea chokepoint pushes US tech companies to overland fiber.

articles.title: Ebola outbreak: WHO declares emergency, US restricts travel, American infected
articles.description: CDC is working to move the infected American and six others to Germany.

articles.title: Legal fail: Don’t use AI to sue Facebook users for calling you a bad date
articles.description: Fake citations dashed a dude’s “Are We Dating the Same Guy” revenge lawsuit.

articles.title: One Mars spacecraft, two senators, and a cloud of questions
articles.description: "I think there's plenty of fire lit under them already."

articles.title: Australian Aboriginals cared for a dingo's grave for decades
articles.description: For some ancient Aboriginal Australian communities, dingoes were part of the family.

articles.title: Elon Musk took too long to sue OpenAI, jury unanimously agrees
articles.description: Musk plans to appeal after judge immediately affirmed the jury's decision.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **谷歌全面发力AI代理与设计**：在IO 2026大会上，谷歌宣布推出Gemini 3.5 Flash模型，战略重心从聊天机器人转向AI代理，并推出AI Studio让用户快速构建Android应用、升级Gemini应用与ChatGPT和Claude竞争，同时发布音频驱动的智能眼镜及可模拟真实街道的Genie世界模型，标志着谷歌在AI领域全面出击。

2. **搜索与邮箱体验重大变革**：谷歌推出可对话的Gmail邮箱功能，并发布“通用购物车”追踪用户全网购物旅程，同时强调传统搜索方式将被AI代理驱动的全新搜索体验取代，用户可通过AI代理进行超越标准搜索的复杂任务。

3. **安全与防务技术新进展**：Discord为所有用户启用了端到端加密的语音和视频通话功能；一名曾是青少年黑客的创业者获2800万美元融资，用于开发对抗AI钓鱼攻击的技术；Mach Industries投入5000万美元解决重大国防技术难题。

4. **AI行业法律与竞争动态**：马斯克在庭审中指控奥特曼“窃取”非营利组织，但证据显示马斯克本人也曾有类似目标，揭示AI领域高层博弈的复杂性。

5. **开发者工具与平台升级**：谷歌发布Android CLI，使基于AI代理的应用程序编码能力得到升级，进一步降低应用开发门槛。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：谷歌在IO 2026上明确将未来押注于AI代理而非传统聊天机器人，并同步推出硬件、软件与搜索体验的全面革新，标志着AI行业从“对话式交互”向“主动执行任务”的关键转折。

articles.description: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.

articles.description: Learn how OpenAI built a secure sandbox for Codex on Windows, enabling safe, efficient coding agents with controlled file access and network restrictions.

articles.title: Our response to the TanStack npm supply chain attack
articles.description: OpenAI details its response to the TanStack “Mini Shai-Hulud” supply chain attack, outlines protections taken to secure systems and signing certificates, and explains why macOS users must update OpenAI apps by June 12, 2026. Learn what happened, what was affected, and how OpenAI is strengthening defenses against evolving software supply chain threats.

articles.title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
articles.description: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a list of blue links. On Tuesday, Google will formally retire that paradigm. At its annual I/O developer conference , Google announced a sweeping redesign of the search box itself — the literal text field where billions of queries begin every day — transforming it from a simple keyword input into a dynamic, AI-driven conversation starter that can accept text, images, PDFs, videos, and even open Chrome tabs as inputs. ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **Google I/O 2026发布多项重磅更新**：包括Gemini 3.5模型（强调智能与行动能力）、AI搜索新模式、Google Workspace新功能，以及进入“Agentic Gemini时代”的全面战略布局。
2. **开源模型与工具集中迭代**：OlmoEarth v1.1推出更高效模型族；Granite Embedding Multilingual R2发布多语言嵌入模型（32K上下文，子1亿参数最佳检索质量）；PaddleOCR 3.5支持Transformers后端进行OCR与文档解析。
3. **AI Agent与检索能力提升**：Open Agent Leaderboard发布，用于评估智能体性能；Ettin Reranker系列模型推出；Hugging Face论文探讨连续批处理中的异步性优化。
4. **AI安全与内容溯源**：OpenAI发布推进内容溯源的技术进展，旨在构建更安全、透明的AI生态系统。
5. **行业应用深化**：NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5通过LoRA/DoRA微调用于机器人视频生成，展示AI在垂直领域的落地。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：Google I/O 2026全面转向Agentic AI，以Gemini 3.5为核心，将AI从“回答问题”升级为“主动执行任务”，标志着AI应用范式的重大转折。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **历史与舆论斗争**：外媒报道东京审判揭穿靖国神社的错误历史叙述，强调中国在历史问题上的正义立场。
2. **科技与产业突破**：中国部署首个风能冷却海底数据中心，稀土杠杆作用增强，去年新增电网规模相当于德国全国装机量，并绕开GPU禁令建成1.54百亿亿次“LineShine”超级计算机。
3. **中美竞争与全球态势**：特朗普启动对华“脱钩”，美国、中国、俄罗斯在同步轨道（GEO）展开竞争，中国AI效率优势明显，影子API市场及AI超级应用重塑互联网格局。
4. **地缘经济摩擦**：澳大利亚要求中国相关投资者出售北方矿业股份，外媒称中国“无形之手”影响全球石油市场。
5. **供应链与市场动向**：英特尔欲利用中国手机供应链制造低价笔记本，中国出现低价购买Claude代币的灰色渠道。

**最值得关注的发展**：中国在科技自主与全球竞争中的多维突破（海底数据中心、超算、稀土杠杆）正在重塑中美技术博弈格局，同时地缘经济摩擦（稀土、能源、太空）持续升级。
